{"query":"Rafah crossing closure history May 2024 early 2025 brief medical evacuation reopening latest February 2026 timeline","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1251,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://abc30.com/post/medical-evacuees-gaza-enter-egypt-rafah-crossing-reopens/18529058/","title":"Medical evacuees from Gaza enter Egypt as the Rafah crossing reopens - ABC30 Fresno","content":"CAIRO -- Medical evacuees from Gaza entered Egypt on Monday as the Rafah border crossing reopened, marking a key step in the Israel-Hamas ceasefire but a mostly symbolic one.
Israel has banned sending patients to hospitals in the Israeli-occupied West Bank and east Jerusalem since the war began, cutting off what was previously the main outlet for Palestinians needing medical treatment unavailable in Gaza.
The Rafah crossing will be supervised by European Union border patrol agents with a small Palestinian presence.
Israeli troops seized the Rafah crossing in May 2024, calling it part of efforts to combat arms-smuggling for the militant Hamas group.
The reopening is seen as a key step as the U.S.-brokered ceasefire agreement moves into its second phase."},{"url":"https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/2/2/gazas-rafah-crossing-reopens-for-limited-traffic","title":"Just five medical patients leave Gaza after Israel reopens Rafah crossing | Gaza News | Al Jazeera","content":"Israel has reopened Gaza’s Rafah border crossing with Egypt for limited traffic after almost two years of closure, but only five Palestinian patients were permitted to leave Gaza on the first day, medical sources told Al Jazeera.
A vital entry point for humanitarian supplies and exit for people awaiting medical evacuation, the crossing is being reopened as stipulated under the United States-brokered “ceasefire” to halt Israel’s genocidal war on Gaza, which came into effect in October.
Israel’s seizure of the Rafah crossing in May 2024, about nine months into its two-year genocidal war on Gaza, cut off an important route for the wounded and sick to receive medical care outside the Palestinian territory."},{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/world/live/2026/feb/02/rafah-border-egypt-gaza-israel-opens-crossing-latest-news-updates","title":"First medical evacuee leaves Gaza as Rafah crossing reopens for handful of Palestinians – as it happened | Gaza | The Guardian","content":"About 150 people were due to leave the territory on Monday, and 50 to enter it, according to Egyptian officials, more than 20 months after Israeli forces closed the crossing.
The crossing had been closed since Israeli troops seized it in May 2024, only briefly opening during a ceasefire in early 2025 for the evacuation of medical patients.
Israel’s military struck several locations in south Lebanon on Monday, including in two villages where it issued evacuation warnings, saying it was hitting Hezbollah targets, AFP reported."},{"url":"https://apnews.com/article/mideast-gaza-egypt-rafah-crossing-medical-treatment-397a2323fb7ef85d274d682258b4a0eb","title":"Gaza's Rafah crossing reopens after 2-day closure | AP News","content":"Palestinians carry the belongings of relatives arriving in Gaza from Egypt following the long-awaited reopening of the Rafah border crossing, in Khan Younis, southern Gaza Strip, early Thursday, Feb.
CAIRO (AP) — A limited number of Palestinians traveled between Gaza and Egypt on Sunday as the Rafah crossing reopened after a two-day closure, Egyptian state media reported.
Amjad Abu Jedian, injured in the war, had been scheduled to leave for medical treatment on the first day of the crossing’s reopening, but only five patients were allowed to travel, said his mother, Raja Abu Jedian."},{"url":"https://www.latimes.com/world-nation/story/2026-02-02/gazas-border-crossing-to-egypt-reopens-in-key-step-for-truce-but-few-palestinians-can-cross","title":"Medical evacuees from Gaza enter Egypt as the Rafah crossing reopens - Los Angeles Times","content":"Rajaa Abu Mustafa stood outside a Gaza hospital where her 17-year-old son Mohamed awaited evacuation.
But Israel’s seizure of the Rafah crossing brought the pace of evacuations to a crawl, with an average of 17 patients a week leaving for most of the time since."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Rafah crossing closure history May 2024 early 2025 brief medical evacuation reopening latest February 2026 timeline","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rafah_Border_Crossing","title":"Rafah Border Crossing","content":"The **Rafah Border Crossing** (Arabic: معبر رفح, romanized: *Ma`bar Rafaḥ*) or **Rafah Crossing Point** is the sole crossing point between Egypt and Palestine's Gaza Strip and Gaza's sole border point with a country other than Israel. The Rafah crossing was opened by Israel after the 1979 peace treaty and remained under Israeli control until 2005, when it was transferred to Egyptian, Palestinian Authority, and EU control, giving Palestinians partial control of an international border for the first time. Under a 2007 agreement between Egypt and Israel, Egypt controls the crossing but imports through the Rafah crossing require Israeli approval. Israel took control of the crossing on 7 May 2024, during the Gaza war, before withdrawing in January 2025 as part of a ceasefire agreement. On 2 February 2026, the crossing was reopened, but since the beginning of the Iran war, it was closed again. Before Israel's disengagement from Gaza on 11 September 2005, the main border crossing at Rafah between Egypt and Gaza was controlled by Israeli authorities.","score":0.9210814,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.wypr.org/2026-02-01/gaza-border-crossing-buzzes-with-activity-after-years-of-near-complete-closure","title":"Gaza border crossing buzzes with activity after years of near-complete ...","content":"Israeli troops seized and closed the Rafah crossing in May 2024, The crossing was briefly opened for the evacuation of medical patients during","score":0.8215175,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://abc7.com/amp/post/medical-evacuees-gaza-enter-egypt-rafah-crossing-reopens/18529058","title":"Medical evacuees from Gaza enter Egypt as the Rafah crossing reopens","content":"The crossing had been closed since Israeli troops seized it in May 2024.
